description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a rectangular base and a slightly angled upper section housing a display screen. The cabinet is predominantly painted in a distressed red and blue color scheme, with pixelated graphics and the word 'Shrimp Arcade Game' prominently displayed on both side panels. The front features a control panel with two round buttons and a joystick, positioned below a screen that displays a simple pixel-art game scene. The top section includes a marquee area with the 'Shrimp' logo, and the overall surface shows signs of wear, giving it a vintage, well-used appearance. The side panels are decorated with pixelated shrimp and aquatic motifs, enhancing the playful, retro theme. The cabinet appears to be constructed mainly from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and screen.
description: A vintage upright arcade game cabinet with red and blue distressed paint, pixel-art graphics, and a 'Shrimp Arcade Game' theme. Features a control panel with buttons and joystick, a screen, and decorative side art.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'Shrimp Arcade Game' logo, pixelated shrimp graphics, and the blue and red color scheme.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, and the marquee with the 'Shrimp' logo.
description_view_2: Right side view similar to the left, with matching graphics and color scheme, including the 'Shrimp Arcade Game' logo.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, distressed red back panel with no graphics or controls visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two round buttons, spaced apart on a flat panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'Shrimp' in bold letters on a light blue background, matching the playful aquatic theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display pixelated shrimp graphics, aquatic motifs, and the 'Shrimp Arcade Game' logo on a blue and red distressed background.
